basis: Frontend session sequencing audit. It verifies sparse long-session event windows keep optimistic events ordered after the real agent sequence tail.

checks.name: knownLastSeq uses sparse loaded event tails
next local event seq follows the real session tail
knownLastSeq also respects event page metadata
appendLocalEvent uses the shared nextLocalEventSeq helper
checks.details: appendLocalEvent must not derive seq from events.length

checks.name: appendLocalEvent no longer uses loaded event count as sequence
checks.details: events.length is only the currently loaded window and is wrong for long sessions

checks.name: optimistic events are explicitly marked local
checks.details: local user/error placeholders must be identifiable when authoritative agent events arrive

checks.name: authoritative SSE events can replace local placeholders
checks.details: incoming agent events with the same seq must replace local optimistic placeholders instead of being dropped
